loginPage.title: Login to your Account
loginPage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account.

error.title: Login Failed
error.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
error.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

signupPage.title: Create an Account
signupPage.description: Enter your information to create an account.

success.title: Account Created
success.description: Welcome! You have been successfully signed up.

error.title: Signup Failed
error.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.
error.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
error.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

buyDialog.title: Buy Asset
buyDialog.description: Select an asset and enter the amount you want to buy.
buyDialog.toastInvalidDescription: Please select an asset and enter a valid amount.

sellDialog.title: Sell Asset
sellDialog.description: Select an asset from your portfolio and enter the amount you want to sell.
sellDialog.toastInvalidDescription: Please select an asset and enter a valid amount.
sellDialog.toastSuccessDescription: You have successfully sold {amount} {symbol} for ${usd}. The funds will be transferred to your bank account.

autoSaveDialog.title: AI Auto-Save
autoSaveDialog.createDescription: Let our AI find the perfect savings plan for you.
autoSaveDialog.suggestionDescription: Based on your info, here's a plan we think you'll like.
autoSaveDialog.goalLabel: What is your primary financial goal? (Optional)
autoSaveDialog.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Save for a house down payment
autoSaveDialog.suggestionCardDescription: Recommended auto-save of ${amount} per month in {asset}.
autoSaveDialog.toastSuccessDescription: Your new plan to save in {asset} has been set up.
autoSaveDialog.toastErrorDescription: Could not generate suggestion. Please try again.

topPerformer.title: Top Performer (24h)
topPerformer.description: The best performing asset in the last 24 hours.

worstPerformer.title: Worst Performer (24h)
worstPerformer.description: The worst performing asset in the last 24 hours.

portfolioChart.title: Portfolio Value
portfolioChart.description: A summary of your portfolio's performance.

assetList.title: My Assets
assetList.description: An overview of your current holdings.
assetList.noResults: No assets found matching your criteria.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your account settings and password.

feedback.title: Submit Feedback
feedback.description: Have a suggestion or found a bug? Let us know!

success.title: Feedback Sent
success.description: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate you helping us improve.

error.title: Submission Failed
error.tooShort: Please enter at least 10 characters for your feedback.
error.general: An error occurred while sending your feedback. Please try again.

iban.title: Bank Accounts (IBAN)
iban.description: Manage your bank accounts for deposits and withdrawals.

deleteConfirm.title: Are you sure?
deleteConfirm.description: This will permanently delete the IBAN ending in {iban}. This action cannot be undone.

success.addDescription: The new bank account has been successfully added.
success.deleteDescription: The bank account has been deleted.

error.title: Error
error.emptyFields: Account holder and IBAN fields cannot be empty.

autoSavePlans.title: Active Auto-Save Plans
autoSavePlans.description: Manage your active automated savings plans.

toast.title: Plan Stopped
toast.description: Your auto-save plan has been successfully stopped.

depositPage.title: Deposit Funds
depositPage.description: Add funds to your VaultWise account.
depositPage.cardDescription: Select the account and enter the amount you want to deposit.
depositPage.noIban: No saved IBANs. Please add one in Settings.

success.title: Deposit Initiated
success.description: Your deposit of {amount} TRY has been initiated. It may take 1-2 business days to reflect in your account.

error.title: Deposit Failed
error.invalidInput: Please select an IBAN and enter a valid amount greater than zero.

withdrawPage.title: Withdraw Funds
withdrawPage.description: Transfer funds from your VaultWise account to your bank.
withdrawPage.cardDescription: Enter the amount to withdraw and select the destination account.
withdrawPage.noIban: No saved IBANs. Please add one in Settings.

success.title: Withdrawal Initiated
success.description: Your withdrawal of ${amount} has been initiated. It may take 1-2 business days to arrive.

error.title: Withdrawal Failed
error.invalidInput: Please select an IBAN and enter a valid amount greater than zero.
